title: OREMinerX
description: A simple vein mining plugin with geysermc support
body:
# OREMinerX: Intelligent Vein Mining for Minecraft

**OREMinerX** revolutionizes the mining experience in Minecraft by introducing smart, efficient vein mining. Unlike basic mining plugins, our tool respects game balance while streamlining resource collection.

## Features

### ⚒️ Intelligent Vein Detection
The plugin intelligently identifies and mines connected veins of the same ore type, turning tedious mining sessions into smooth experiences. Find a diamond? One click reveals the entire vein!

### 🔄 Simple Toggle System
Activate or deactivate vein mining with a simple command (`/oreminerx`). This gives you complete control over when to use the feature - perfect for switching between mining modes without changing tools.

### ⚙️ Comprehensive Configuration
Every aspect is customizable:
- Set which ore types work with vein mining
- Configure maximum vein size to prevent server strain
- Adjust tool durability consumption
- Toggle experience drops
- Fine-tune permissions for server administration

### 📊 Tool Preservation
The plugin intelligently manages tool durability, applying appropriate wear based on the number of blocks mined. Tools will break naturally after extensive use, maintaining game balance.

### 🔍 Compatible with Fortune & Silk Touch
Works seamlessly with enchanted tools, correctly applying Fortune and Silk Touch effects to all blocks in the vein.

### 🧪 Experience Distribution
Collects and distributes experience orbs from all mined blocks, ensuring players receive proper rewards for their mining efforts.

### 🚀 Performance Optimized
Built with performance in mind, ensuring smooth operation even on busy servers. The vein size limiter prevents excessive block processing that could cause lag.

## Why Choose This Plugin?

This vein miner strikes the perfect balance between convenience and gameplay integrity. It doesn't make mining trivial - it makes it enjoyable. By removing the tedium of mining while preserving tool durability mechanics and resource costs, the plugin enhances Minecraft's mining experience without breaking it.

Perfect for survival servers where quality-of-life improvements are valued but game balance remains important. Server owners can easily customize settings to match their community's preferences, whether focusing on casual play or more challenging experiences.

## Technical Details

- Built for Bukkit/Spigot/Paper servers
- Compatible with Minecraft 1.21+
- Minimal impact on server performance
- Permissions integration for fine-grained control
- Tool durability handling respects vanilla mechanics

Transform your mining experience with a tool that honors Minecraft's core gameplay while streamlining its most repetitive aspects.


[![PlayerCONSOLE ad](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d058bf6c8422c553e1843b0cb2efcb237d345e39.png)](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/%E2%9C%A8%E3%80%90%E2%98%85-player%E2%9C%A6console-%E2%98%85%E3%80%91%E2%9C%A8-%E2%8E%AE-remote-admin-panel-50-off-%E2%8E%AE-velocity-support-file-managing-%E2%9B%8F%EF%B8%8F.126241/)
